verdict: Baebody's cream-based formula emphasizes moisturization alongside retinol, making it suitable for beginners or dry skin. However, the retinol concentration is undisclosed, limiting ability to assess true potency compared to competitors.

_research.name: Retinol Plus Anti-Aging Cream
pros: Rich emollient base with shea butter and jojoba oil
_research.con: Undisclosed retinol concentration obscures actual efficacy level.
